title: Flashcards
subtitle: Study smarter with active recall
emptyDecks: No decks yet. Create one to start studying!
noCardsMsg: This deck has no cards yet. Add some first!
deckDescPlaceholder: Brief description of what this deck covers
subject: Subject
deckFormError: Please enter a title and select a subject.
frontPlaceholder: What is the question or concept?
backPlaceholder: What is the answer or explanation?

generate.title: Create Flashcards with AI
generate.subtitle: Transform content into study cards
generate.countLabel: How many cards do you want?
generate.countHint: We recommend between 5 and 20 cards for better retention
generate.tooShort: Content is too short for {{count}} cards. Try {{recommended}} instead?

errors.groqApiKeyMissing: Groq API Key is missing from .env.local file
errors.generationFailed: Error generating cards. Please try again.

importDeckDescription: Upload your deck and start studying! 🚀
selectItemType: What type of item do you want to create?
statementPlaceholder: Water boils at 100C at sea level...
hintPlaceholder: A subtle hint to guide the student...
explanationPlaceholder: Why is this the correct answer?
frontBackRequired: Complete both the front and back.
deleteItemConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this evaluation item?
searchingConfusions: Looking for concepts you might confuse.
confusionSubtitle: The analysis found {{count}} pair{{plural}} that are often confused. Generate a contrast card to fix the difference.
cardCreatedMsg: A contrast card between "{{conceptA}}" and "{{conceptB}}" was added to your deck.
snoozeDescription: Choose when you want the review to reappear. This keeps your learning momentum going.
snoozeScience: Periods are designed based on spaced learning science.

snooze.in30minDesc: Keep the momentum - review in the next short session
snooze.in30minPed: Immediate review to consolidate short-term memory
snooze.in4hoursPed: Optimal interval for reinforcement before forgetting (Ebbinghaus curve)
snooze.tomorrowDesc: Review in the next study session
snooze.in3daysDesc: Resume in the next important session
snooze.in3daysPed: Critical SM-2 phase before forgetting (~70% retention)

enterValidItemCount: Enter a valid number of items
contentTooShortMsg: The text is too short to generate quality items.
noDeckId: Could not get the created deck ID.
aiWillAnalyze: AI will analyze the content and generate college-level assessment items.
filePickerError: Could not open the file picker.
shareNotAvailable: Sharing is not available on your device.
cardRequiresData: The card must have a valid "data" field.
cardRequiresOptions: Multiple choice requires "data.options" (array with at least 2 options).
cardCorrectIndexOutOfRange: data.correctIndex is out of options range.
jsonMissingTitle: The JSON file must contain a "title" field.
maxCardsExceeded: The deck exceeds the limit of 20 cards. Reduce the amount and try again.
cardTooLarge: Card #{{num}} exceeds the 50KB limit. Reduce its content.
importCompleteWithErrors: Deck "{{title}}" imported with {{successCount}} successful card(s) and {{errorCount}} error(s).
invalidJSON: The file is not a valid JSON.

template.supportedLanguages: SUPPORTED LANGUAGES ({{count}} registered): {{languages}}. The app supports over 190 programming languages. If you need a language not listed, request it in Settings > About Us.
template.title: My Example Deck
template.description: Max 200 characters. Describe the deck content.
template.mcQuestion: What is the capital of France?
template.mcExplanation: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France.
template.boolExplanation: During photosynthesis, plants convert CO₂ and water into glucose and oxygen.
template.gitFront:
Complete the Git command:

git ___ origin main

template.gitBack:
The command is `push`:

```bash
git push origin main
```
template.gitExplanation: `git push` sends local commits to the remote repository.
